name: IRC_CAMP_AUDIENCE
description: Stores the complete list of audience for a campaign.

columns.Name: AUDIENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the assignment ID of the person.Foreign Key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M.

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the Audience Status. Lookup type - ORA_HCO_CAMP_AUD_STATUS

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the PERSON_ID of the audience. Foreign key to IRC_CANDIDATES table.

columns.Name: AUDIENCE_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the type of the audience. Lookup type - ORA_IRC_CAMP_AUDIENCE_TYPE

columns.Name: UNSUBSCRIBED_TOKEN_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the reference to the token generated for the unsubscribe link that will be sent for this person via this campaign.

columns.Name: UNSUBSCRIBED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores if the candidate unsubscribed from marketing emails through this campaign.

columns.Name: WORKER_JOURNEY_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the latest instance of the allocation of the journey to the person.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
